titleStmt.title: SII 10.107: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 107. (A.R. No. 393 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF VEMULAMMA, NĀDIṆḌLA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 1061.

summary.p: Refers to a gift of 55 sheep by Manma-Maṇḍayarāja, a subordinate of Kulōttuṅga-chōḍa for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Karṇamōṭī of Nādiṇḍla. It also refers to certain lands assigned to dancing girls and some other servants of the temple. Contains also a not quite intelligible reference to a duty on marriages performed in Nādiṇḍla to be paid to the temple. Maṇḍa was the son of Buddha, son of Maṇḍa, chief of Giripaschima country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Āsīttriṇayanapallavakāruṇyāllabdhaṣaṭsa
hasramahīśa śrī buddhava¨rmmanṛpati stadvaṁśēja
ni sa maṁḍanṛpamā¨rttaṁḍaḥ . śrīma drājēṁ dra
cōḍakṣitipatikaṭakatrāṇadō¨rmmaṁḍalāgrā
bhīlōttālāṁśu jālāhataraṇatimirō bhūbhṛ
taḥ paścimakṣmānāthaḥ kāliṁgagaṁgaprakaṭagajagha
ṭābandhanaprauḍhaśau¨ryyaḥ killōrābdhānilō sau vima
linayaśasā maṁḍabhūpaścakāsē . tannaṁdanō vima
ladu¨rjjayarājavaṁśaṁ vārāśiva¨rddhanaśaśī sa hi
buddhabhūva ssāsādhvatī gaḍiyamā nijahriddhṛtī
tatpatnī tayō¨rjjayati maṁḍanṛpa ssuputraḥ . ja
yati paramahīśaprāṁsudēhakṣatēbhyaḥ kṣara
dasrugjalaughai ssikta tīvrāsivallī maruṇakiraṇalē
khāṁ pū¨rvvadigmūladriṣṭā mina yiva nuta tējō
dhāraya nmanmamaṁḍaḥ . candra¨rttuvyōmaśīta dyutimi
taśakabhūpālakābdēṣu rūḍhēṣvāśvējē kṛ ṣṇapa
kṣē kuliśadharatithau tārakēśasya vārēprādātsō
manmamaṁḍakṣitipatiracalāṁ sa¨rvvasasyapraśastāṁ
nādiṁḍlādhiṣṭhitāyai ciratara miha tatka¨rṇna mō
ṭyai śubhā¨rtthaṁ . svasti samadhigatapaṁcama hāsabda
mahāmaṁḍalēśvara vīramāhēśvara kulōttuṁga cōḍa
dēva divyaśrīpādārādhaka parabalasādhaka Ela
dāyasiṁgha sāhasōttuṁgga du¨rjjayakula kumu
dakṣīrā¨rnnavaniśākara . mitravanajava
nadivākara raṇaraṁgarāma AnaAṁkabhīma su
kavikīrasahakāra nujanajanādhāra vikra
makrīḍāvinōda kāvyavinōda vivēkapadmā
sana giripaścimaśāśana śatyarādhēya cevuca gāṁgē
ya nāmādi samastaprasvastisahitaṁ

śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra manmamaṇḍayarāju Idē
varaku yakhaṁḍava¨rttidīpaṁbunaku
Iccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jēko
ni guṁḍabōyukoḍku nāvabōyuṁ
tana putrānupauvitrikamu nityamā
neṇḍu neyi diviyakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
nādiṁḍlaṁ beṁḍlisēsina vāru koḍku
vāru gadyānamuna naḍuvuna Ayi
rāni rūkānu vidyāmaṁtulaku
pūjāri kha 3 naṭṭavula dāḍapōju
malle kha 6 maddaliya
maddaliyekkapakāme kha 4 pāḍiḍi me
ḍiyama kha 4 pāḍiḍi jakke kha 4
dāḍapōjumanmarālu muppe jakke
sānipōcaka kha basaviseṭṭi bōca
ka kha 3 vaidanūṁke māraka kha 3 bō
yu buddananūraka kha yenamaṭṭamu
bhollekētama kha 3 mādirāju māra
ka kha kommapadugga kha 3 kāmināgā
kha 3 cikagētarēka kha koṭyamanāya
ku manmaṟālu nāga kha 3 gōkanadāraka kha 3
Ī nādiḍlapolamunaṁ baścimadikku
na dēviki nānulaku mānulaku vi
dyāmaṁtulaku bhōgā¨rtthamuṁ gā
ṁ beṭṭina polamu kha 73 pōtanapeggaḍa
ceṟvunadēvi nivēdyamunaku niccina nīri
polamu maṟtulu 6 poyigāramu
keṁdāmarā kannōju kha 1 peddanabō
yini manmaṟālu [A]yitaka kha 3 prōlekēta
ka kha 3 duggevalli kha 3
saṁkudhārakanne kha 3 vāsana Ayta
ka kha 3 mēlunāyaka sūre manmaṟālu cennaka
kha 3 śvadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
[yatē krimiḥ .] bahubhi¨rvasudhā dattā bahu
[bhiścānupālitā Esya] Esya yadā bhūmi
stasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . navabōyuniki
kuṁṭalōpugā kha 1 tellaṁgūṭi
kāmekūtuṟu mācaka kha 3 cēbrō
lipalle gaṁgga kha 3
Digital edition of SII 10.107 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
